skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered video production agent that creates short videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content creation
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Legitimate video production tool for Pexo.ai service. Static scanner detected 492 patterns, but evaluation confirms all are false positives or expected behavior for an API-based video generation tool. External commands are shell script operations, environment access is for API authentication (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL), filesystem access is for config and temp files, and network requests go only to official pexo.ai endpoints. No malicious intent, data exfiltration, or suspicious patterns found.

medium_findings.title: Requires API Credentials
medium_findings.description: Skill requires PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variables to function. These are standard API authentication credentials for the Pexo.ai service and are required for legitimate video production operations.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access for Configuration
low_findings.description: Skill reads ~/.pexo/config file for API credentials. This is expected behavior for CLI tools requiring persistent configuration.

low_findings.title: Temporary File Creation
low_findings.description: Shell scripts create temporary files for HTTP request handling. This is standard practice for curl-based API clients.

low_findings.title: External Service Dependency
low_findings.description: All network requests go to pexo.ai domain. Users must trust this external service for video generation.

content.value_statement: Generate professional short videos (5-120 seconds) for social media, marketing, and content. The skill handles scriptwriting, visuals, and production automatically.
actual_capabilities: Create short videos (5-120 seconds) in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Upload images, videos, and audio files to use as source material
Generate product advertisements, social media content, and explainer videos
Handle video revisions and refinements through iterative feedback
Download completed videos with direct URLs
List and manage multiple video projects
limitations: Video production takes approximately 15-20 minutes for a 15-second video
Requires active internet connection and valid Pexo.ai API credentials
Cannot crawl or fetch files from web URLs - files must be downloaded first
Each API request consumes tokens - costs may apply for API usage

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creator
use_cases.description: Create engaging short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Upload product photos and generate promotional content automatically.

use_cases.title: Marketing Professional
use_cases.description: Produce product advertisements and brand videos quickly. Upload product images and specify messaging to get polished marketing videos.

use_cases.title: Business Owner
use_cases.description: Create explainer videos and promotional clips without video production expertise. Simply describe your product and let Pexo handle the creative work.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Simple Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second product video for my coffee brand. I want a warm, inviting tone with close-up shots of brewing coffee.
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic video creation request without source materials

prompt_templates.title: Video with Product Images
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to make a video showcasing my shoe collection. Here are some product photos: [upload product-image.jpg]. Create a dynamic 45-second fashion video.
prompt_templates.scenario: Video creation using uploaded images as reference material

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Aspect Ratio Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create versions of my promotional video in all three formats: 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, and 1:1 for Instagram.
prompt_templates.scenario: Requesting multiple aspect ratio versions of the same video

prompt_templates.title: Revise Existing Video
prompt_templates.prompt: The video you created is good, but I want the pacing to be faster and add more transition effects between scenes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Requesting changes to an already-created video

output_examples.input: Create a 15-second promo video for my fitness app with high energy music
output_examples.output:
I have submitted your video request to Pexo. Estimated completion time: 15-20 minutes. Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_123

[Polling for status...]

Your video is ready. Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/123/assets/video.mp4
Project: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_123

output_examples.input: Upload this image and create a product video for it [product.jpg]
output_examples.output:
Uploading product.jpg...
Asset ID: a_1a2b3c4d

Creating video with product reference...
Request submitted. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes.

[Video completes]

Your product video is ready: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/video.mp4

best_practices: Provide clear, specific descriptions of the video you want - include tone, pacing, and visual style preferences
Upload high-quality source images and videos for better results - supported formats include jpg, png, mp4, and mp3
Use the exact same project ID when requesting revisions - creating a new project starts from scratch
Wait the full 15-20 minutes for video generation before checking status - polling too frequently may cause issues
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style parameters that the user did not specify - let Pexo's video agent determine these professionally
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during the WAIT state - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not truncate video download URLs - the full URL with OSSAccessKeyId and Signature parameters is required
Do not wrap URLs in markdown [text](url) format - send as plain text to avoid URL breaks

faq.question: What video formats can I create?
faq.answer: You can create videos in 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (portrait), or 1:1 (square) aspect ratios. Video length can range from 5 to 120 seconds.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Approximately 15-20 minutes for a 15-second video. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time.

faq.question: What file types can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: Do I need a Pexo.ai account?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to register at pexo.ai and obtain an API key. Configure it in ~/.pexo/config before using this skill.

faq.question: Can I revise a video after it is created?
faq.answer: Yes, use the same project_id and send your feedback via pexo-chat.sh. Pexo will generate a revised version based on your input.

faq.question: Are there costs associated with using this skill?
faq.answer: The skill itself is free, but Pexo.ai is a paid service. API usage consumes tokens and you will be charged according to Pexo's pricing plan.
